title: New web tools give Alaskans a window into climate data
summary: “Hypercubes” might sound like objects from a science fiction novel, but, with the launch of new web tools, scientists at the University of Alaska Fairbanks International Arctic Research Center are employing them to show climate futures in ways that all Alaskans can use. For any location in Alaska, there are dozens of data sets that provide information about temperature, precipitation, wildfire risk...

title: Student Highlight – Annette Piscoya
summary: When everything tells you that you can’t do it – remember you CAN! Annette Piscoya took 3 years to pursue her interest in truck driving because for a while, the “can’ts” held her back. ” I didn’t think I would be able to do it. I thought I was too old. I was told I wasn’t going to be able to put on the truck chains,” Annette reflected. “But when I was challenged and was told I couldn’t, I decided then I was going to show them I could do it. It’s not hard once you learn, and you’re never too old to learn stuff. I can do it. I am going to show them I can do it.” And so she did, and did it wel...
